actions.action: Get the plant name from the farmer

recipe.steps: Ask the farmer for the name of the plant they are currently growing.
Save the obtained plant name in memory using the key 'plant_details.plant_name'.
Verify the completion of the action 'Get the plant name from the farmer' for the persona 'Farmer'.

actions.can_perform_without_user_input: no-i need user's likes and dislike
